commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a case-insensitive `dreaming-narrative` session-key exclusion to active-memory eligibility and a focused regression test.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +15. Total +18 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main accepts user/webchat contexts with any session identifier, memory-core creates `dreaming-narrative-*` session keys, and the gateway forwards them into agent runs. I did not run a live cron-window reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed for real behavior proof; automation cannot substitute runtime evidence from an external PR setup.

target.title: fix(active-memory): exclude dreaming-narrative session keys from interactive eligibility gate
target.body:
## Summary

- AM eligibility gate (`isEligibleInteractiveSession`) accepted dreaming-narrative cron session keys because they share `trigger="user"` with real conversational sessions.
- Each false-accepted invocation paid the full active-memory cold-start cost inside a hardcoded 45000ms command-lane budget, reliably causing timeouts during cron windows.
- Added a guard clause in `isEligibleInteractiveSession` that returns `false` when `ctx.sessionKey` contains `"dreaming-narrative"` (case-insensitive, matches both bare `dreaming-narrative-light-<hash>` and prefixed `agent:<agent>:dreaming-narrative-light-<hash>` formats).
- Fixes #78500

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/active-memory` — 3 test files, 159 tests passed
- `pnpm test:contracts` — pending
- Autoreview: clean (fix reviewed and approved via openclaw-pr-review)

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** active-memory eligibility gate was accepting dreaming-narrative cron session keys as "interactive", causing cold-start timeouts in the 45s lane budget during cron windows.

**Real environment tested:** Linux 4.19.112, Node 22.19, branch fix/active-memory-dreaming-gate at b018089980

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
```bash
# 1. Source diff
git show b018089980 -- extensions/active-memory/index.ts

# 2. Proof script — standalone guard logic exercise with 9 scenarios
node proof-93168.mjs

# 3. Unit test suite
pnpm test extensions/active-memory
```

**Evidence after fix:**
```console
$ git show b018089980 -- extensions/active-memory/index.ts
commit b0180899804988969c979ac1c45b2817ecb9b962
Author: xialonglee <li.xialong@xydigit.com>
Date:   Mon Jun 15 12:12:46 2026 +0800

    fix(active-memory): exclude dreaming-narrative session keys from interactive eligibility gate

diff --git a/extensions/active-memory/index.ts b/extensions/active-memory/index.ts
index 77d68b0497..308b428292 100644
--- a/extensions/active-memory/index.ts
+++ b/extensions/active-memory/index.ts
@@ -1155,6 +1155,12 @@ function isEligibleInteractiveSession(ctx: {
   if (ctx.trigger !== "user") {
     return false;
   }
+  // Exclude non-interactive cron narrative session keys (e.g.
+  // agent:<agent>:dreaming-narrative-light-<workspaceId>-<ts>) that share
+  // trigger="user" but are not conversational and bust the AM lane budget.
+  if (ctx.sessionKey?.toLowerCase().includes("dreaming-narrative")) {
+    return false;
+  }
   if (!ctx.sessionKey && !ctx.sessionId) {
     return false;
   }

$ node proof-93168.mjs

Scenario                                                Expected   Got        Status
dreaming-narrative light (bare format)                  false      false      PASS
dreaming-narrative light (agent: prefix)                false      false      PASS
dreaming-narrative heavy (agent: prefix)                false      false      PASS
DREAMING-NARRATIVE (case-insensitive check)             false      false      PASS
Dreaming-Narrative (mixed case)                         false      false      PASS
normal webchat user                                     true       true       PASS
normal telegram user                                    true       true       PASS
no session key or id                                    false      false      PASS
non-user trigger                                        false      false      PASS

Total: 9 | Passed: 9 | Failed: 0

$ pnpm test extensions/active-memory
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  159 passed (159)
   Start at  16:36:35
   Duration  51.36s
```

**Observed result after fix:** `isEligibleInteractiveSession` returns `false` for all dreaming-narrative session key variants (bare, agent-prefixed, uppercase, mixed case) while normal interactive sessions remain eligible. Unit test suite passes with 159 tests.

**What was not tested:** Live cron window reproduction with actual dreaming-narrative scheduler (requires full runtime integration test); unit-level validation is covered by the code change structure, proof script, and existing test suite passing.
